summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Lluvia Live notification system and RoomView stability. All backend APIs (12/12 tests passed - 100%) and frontend UI flows working correctly. Notification system with 4 categories fully functional. RoomView stability confirmed with h-screen overflow-hidden layout.

minor.issue: Agora SDK shows 'invalid vendor key, can not find appid' error - audio connection fails but this is expected in test environment with test credentials

passed_tests: Backend: GET /api/notifications/{user_id} returns list of notifications (200)
Backend: GET /api/notifications/{user_id}/unread-count returns count (200)
Backend: POST /api/notifications/{user_id}/mark-read marks all as read (200)
Backend: GET /api/notifications/{user_id}/preferences returns prefs (200)
Backend: PUT /api/notifications/{user_id}/preferences updates prefs (200)
Backend: Login creates alerta_conexion notification
Backend: GET /api/rooms/{room_id} returns room with seats array
Backend: POST /api/rooms/{room_id}/join and /leave work correctly
Backend: GET /api/rooms/{room_id}/chat returns messages
Backend: POST /api/rooms/{room_id}/welcome creates invitacion notification
Backend: Notification filtering by preferences works
Backend: Invitacion category is always active (AUTO)
Frontend: Login with Melvin_Live / test123 successful
Frontend: Dashboard shows bell icon with unread notification count badge
Frontend: Clicking bell navigates to NotificationsView
Frontend: NotificationsView shows list of notifications
Frontend: NotificationsView has settings button that opens 4 notification categories
Frontend: Regalos Globales toggle works (ON/OFF)
Frontend: Eventos CP/Batallas toggle works (ON/OFF)
Frontend: Alertas de Conexion toggle works (ON/OFF)
Frontend: Invitaciones de Estrategia shows as AUTO (no toggle)
Frontend: Back button on NotificationsView returns to dashboard
Frontend: RoomView has h-screen class (stable layout)
Frontend: RoomView has overflow-hidden (no page scrolling)
Frontend: Seats area has max-height 40vh (scrollable)
Frontend: Chat container has overflow-y-auto (scrollable)
Frontend: Page does NOT scroll when in RoomView
Frontend: Audio controls appear at bottom of screen (Y=1020 on 1080p)
Frontend: Mute button has data-testid='toggle-mute-btn'
Frontend: Deafen button has data-testid='toggle-deafen-btn'
Frontend: Leave seat button has data-testid='leave-seat-btn'
seed_data_creation: Notifications created automatically via login hooks (alerta_conexion) and room welcome hooks (invitacion)
context_for_next_testing_agent: All new features working: 1) Notification system with 4 categories (regalo_global, evento_cp, alerta_conexion, invitacion) fully functional. Bell icon shows unread count badge. Settings panel allows toggling 3 categories, invitacion is AUTO. 2) RoomView stability confirmed - h-screen overflow-hidden layout prevents page scrolling. Seats area has max-height 40vh, chat has its own scroll. Audio controls appear at fixed bottom position when seated. Agora audio shows 'invalid vendor key' error in test environment but this is expected with test credentials.
notes: The notification system creates notifications automatically: alerta_conexion on login, invitacion on room welcome, evento_cp on CP create/level-up, regalo_global on big gifts (dragon, castillo, lluvia_oro, mega_crown). All notification preferences are stored per-user and filter the notifications list accordingly.
